title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Natco Pharma South Asia Partners:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma South Asia Partners!
